entries.jurisdiction: UK (England, Scotland, Wales and Northern Ireland)
entries.definition: A legal requirement setting clear timescales for social landlords to investigate and fix serious housing hazards, beginning with damp and mould.
entries.operational: Drives repairs triage, inspection response times, contractor escalation, and complaints handling.
entries.caution: Failure to comply can create legal, regulatory, and reputational risk.

entries.jurisdiction: UK (England, Scotland, Wales and Northern Ireland)
entries.definition: A ring-fenced account recording income and expenditure relating to council-owned housing.
entries.operational: Used for budget planning, compliance, and financial reporting.
